zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Stephens於1500年2月15日出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，他的父親John Edward Stephens VII40歲，母親Lady Joan Alice Atheward37歲。他於大約1512年與Margaret de Leon在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1579年在英國英格蘭維爾爾享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Stephens was born on 15 February 1500, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Edward Stephens VII, was 40 and his mother, Lady Joan Alice Atheward, was 37. He married Margaret de Leon about 1512, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1579, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Stephens est né le 15 février 1500, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Edward Stephens VII, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Alice Atheward, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Leon environ 1512, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1579, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Stephens am 15. Februar 1500 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Edward Stephens VII 40 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Alice Atheward 37. Er hat um 1512 in Buckinghamshire, England Margaret de Leon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1579 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Stephens è nato il il 15 febbraio 1500 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Edward Stephens VII, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Alice Atheward, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Leon circa 1512, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1579, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Stephensが1500年2月15日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父John Edward Stephens VIIは40歳，母Lady Joan Alice Athewardは37歳であった。約1512年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでMargaret de Leonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1579年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで79歳で死去した。

ko.Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London,: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 처르치 알드가트
ko.St Peter's-Frocester, Gloucestershire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프록스터 스트 피터'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Stephens(이)가 1500년 2월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Edward Stephens VII(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Alice Atheward(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1512년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Margaret de Leon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1579년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London,: Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.London, London, England: London, Madison, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América
pt.St Peter's-Frocester, Gloucestershire, E: St Peter's Church, Frocester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Stephens nasceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1500, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Edward Stephens VII, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Alice Atheward, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Leon aproximadamente 1512, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1579, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London,: сеинт ботолф'с чурч алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.St Peter's-Frocester, Gloucestershire, E: ст питир'с чурч, фросестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Stephens родился 15 февраля 1500 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Edward Stephens VII было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Alice Atheward, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Leon около 1512 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1579 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Stephens nació el 15 de febrero de 1500, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Edward Stephens VII, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Alice Atheward, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Margaret de Leon aproximadamente 1512, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1579, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
